name: YIN
title: THE PENANGALAN

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: U Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

triggers.name: You're Coming With Me
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model in base contact with it.

triggers.name: Drink Blood
triggers.text: When resolving, this model heals an amount equal to the damage suffered by the target.

actions.name: Feed on Grief
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 2" of a Remains marker, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: If this action kills the target, this model heals 2.

triggers.name: From the Um
triggers.text: Remove a Remains marker within 2" of the target. An ally within range gains a Greedy token.

actions.name: Empower Ancestor
actions.effects: Target may move up to 3" and gains a Greedy token.

triggers.name: Funeral Leavings
triggers.text: Once per activation. Attach a Reliquary upgrade to the target.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE PENANGALAN' back='The Penangalan'
